message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for 6 more connectors

Implement provisioning recipes, readiness checks, base_url_policy,
and SelfCheckReport for mcp-bridge (permissive, API token),
box (OAuth PKCE), n8n (API key, self-hosted), make (API token),
zapier (API key), and retool (API key, self-hosted).

~161 new tests across 6 connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
